service_boxes.title: Complete Health Care
service_boxes.text: Whether you suffer from hypertension, diabetes, coronary artery disease, or more, you'll get the care you need.

service_boxes.title: Chiropractic Services
service_boxes.text: Dr. Amar Patel's chiropractic experience can help alleviate your chronic or intermittent pain fast.

service_boxes.title: 24/7 Availability
service_boxes.text: When you need help, we're available 24/7 to take your call. Your call will be returned promptly so you know what steps to take next.

service_boxes.title: Insurance Accepted
service_boxes.text: We accept over 20 insurance plans so all our patients can get the care they need. Call to find out if your plan is accepted.

about.title: About Us
content: American Primary Care boasts 20+ years of managed care experience, helping patients with diabetes, hypertension, coronary artery disease, renal disease, endocrine disorders, and more. Additionally, chiropractic services are available to alleviate chronic pain.

Dr. Sadhana Shah has been practicing medicine since 1992 and is one of the top physicians in the Tampa Bay area offering overall wellness programs. She is board certified by the American Board of Internal Medicine, the American Board of Geriatric Medicine, and the American College of Specialist in Geriatrics.
When you need urgent healthcare, you'll find it at American Primary Care — call our office and the answering service will contact your doctor for a fast response.
We have 4 convenient locations in Palm Harbor, New Port Richey, and Holiday to serve you. Our team speaks English, Russian, Spanish, and Gujarati.
